title: paspalum mutabile
intro: Paspalum mutabile, also known as changeable grass or tropical grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa and Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum mutabile include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
